summary: Full backend + frontend e2e testing of Soterion DeFi platform. All 15 pytest cases passed including automation-worker liquidation flow. All frontend flows verified (landing, connect, supply, automation config, AI insight, disconnect).

issues: Recharts logs multiple 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings — ResponsiveContainer has no minWidth/minHeight. Cosmetic only; charts still render.

action_items: (Optional) Add minWidth/minHeight or fixed dims to Recharts ResponsiveContainer to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 646 lines — consider splitting into routers/services (markets, wallet, tx, automation, ai) for maintainability.
automation_worker calls save_user() for every enabled user every 6s regardless of change — could be optimized.
Real Stellar Horizon fetch is unauthenticated public endpoint; if it fails silently only warning logged (already handled).
connect_wallet regenerates 'is_new' via find_one before get_or_create — fine, but two round trips.
seed_data_creation: Test-only wallets prefixed with GTEST/GLIQ/GNOCOLL created via /api/wallet/connect — safe throwaway data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest). Automation-worker liquidation flow verified end-to-end (creates wallet, supplies, borrows near max, sets trigger above current HF, waits ~18s, verifies /api/liquidations returns event). AI insight endpoint takes ~5-10s and returns properly-formatted RISK LEVEL/KEY SIGNAL/RECOMMENDATION/MARKET NOTE via Emergent LLM (claude-sonnet-4-6).
